title: Exit should accept type, value, and traceback arguments
description: The `exit()` function should be called with the correct arguments to provide proper context for errors.
message: Call to exit function lacks type, value, or traceback arguments.
impact: Reduces the clarity of error messages
recommendation: Use the `sys.exit()` function with the appropriate arguments.

compliant.description: Exit with an error code and message
Exit with an error code, message, and traceback

why_is_this_an_issue: Lack of proper arguments makes it difficult to understand error context.
how_to_fix: Use the `sys.exit()` function with the appropriate arguments.
